results.result: BAD_PATTERN — verification pattern is self-referential (tests that the PROP file itself exists with a verification_pattern field). Returns FIXED only because the PROP file exists. The actual proposal target — pre-compute Priority 3 change-detection candidates in a deterministic Node script — is unverified. Treating as STILL_OPEN. PROP-020 needs a real verification_pattern. PROP-003 cautionary tale exactly.
BAD_PATTERN — same self-referential verification (file-exists-and-has-verification_pattern). Treating as STILL_OPEN. PROP-021 also needs a real verification_pattern.
NO_PATTERN_AUTOVERIFY — verification_pattern field exists but contains JSON-like structured-test descriptions, not bash. Cannot auto-verify. Requires manual check or pattern rewrite.
NO_PATTERN_AUTOVERIFY — same issue (structured-test JSON in verification_pattern). Cannot auto-verify.
NO_PATTERN — no verification_pattern field at all (amendment file).
NO_PATTERN — no verification_pattern field (large multi-phase architecture proposal).
NO_PATTERN — status field unset entirely; no verification_pattern.

prop_lifecycle_verification.summary: 3 PROPs auto-closed (PROP-014, PROP-016, PROP-019 had stale status fields — main was already fixed but the PROP file said proposed). 4 PROPs legitimately STILL_BROKEN (PROP-005, PROP-008, PROP-011, PROP-012). 2 PROPs need verification_pattern fixes (PROP-020 and PROP-021 are self-referential — false positive risk identical to PROP-003 cautionary tale). 5 PROPs lack auto-verifiable patterns (PROP-017/018 have non-bash patterns; amendments and large architecture PROPs have no patterns at all).

findings.description: CLAUDE.md and tinker.md schedule tables list dome-integrity / dome-tinker / dome-social as 'Daily 9 AM / 10:30 AM / 11 AM' — does not match actual cron in any timezone. Real schedule (operator local, observed via list_scheduled_tasks lastRunAt): integrity 02:00, tinker 03:30, social 04:30.
findings.evidence: list_scheduled_tasks output: dome-integrity cron='0 2 * * *' lastRun=2026-05-07T01:08:15Z; dome-tinker cron='30 3 * * *' lastRun=2026-05-07T02:39:42Z; dome-social cron='30 4 * * *' lastRun=2026-05-06T03:36:33Z. CLAUDE.md L131-133 and tinker.md L19-21 both stale.
findings.fix_method: STRANDED — self-fix patches were authored in clean clone but the PAT was 403/Devilwench-denied for push. Both files (CLAUDE.md, monitor/prompts/tinker.md) are in workspace-sync NEVER_PUSH so the universal-pusher rescue path does NOT cover them. Patches written to monitor/tinker/stranded-self-fix-2026-05-07T02-40.json for operator manual application.

findings.description: Several directories actively used by agents are not classified in CLAUDE.md File Ownership table. Without classification, build.js publish + workspace-sync may treat them inconsistently. PROP-023 authored.
findings.evidence: Found unclassified or under-documented: monitor/tinker/operator-directives/ (mentioned only in DIRECTIVE-LIFECYCLE additive-edit exception block, not in append-only list); monitor/scripts/ (3 production scripts: verify-pending-state.js, audit-narrative-citations.js, compute-drift-audit.js — zero mentions in CLAUDE.md); monitor/decisions/applied-patches/ (mentioned in universal-pusher block but not in append-only list); monitor/decisions/applied-stranded-patches/ (zero mentions); monitor/prompts/reference/state-verification.md (PROP-014 reference file, not in any per-agent reference list); monitor/prompts/reference/state-file-archives.md (PROP-022 reference, not classified).
findings.recommended_action: Operator reviews PROP-023 and approves classification updates to CLAUDE.md, build.js OWNERSHIP, and reference lists in CLAUDE.md per-agent table.

findings.description: Decider's total context grew from 1977L (2026-05-01 baseline) to 2255L (today) = +14.1% — exceeds 10% moderate-flag threshold. Drivers: PROP-014, PROP-016, PROP-022 phases 2-3 each added mechanisms to decider-patches-and-selfapply.md (+119L, +29.4%), decider-intake.md (+55L, +26.1%), decider-curmudgeon.md (+34L, +14.7%), decider-reporting.md (+25L, +14.4%), decider.md dispatcher (+33L, +6.8%), DATA-SCHEMAS.md (+10L, +8.8%). All growth was justified protocol additions (not bloat), but the cumulative effect now meaningfully widens decider's per-run context.
findings.evidence: Component diff vs commit cd8af4b5 (anchor before 2026-05-02): see context_load.per_agent.decider.delta_breakdown below.
findings.recommended_action: Two reviews to consider in next Mode 3 cycle: (1) PROP-014 mechanism docs in decider-patches-and-selfapply.md — could write-verify protocol be moved to a 'state-verification.md' reference that decider reads only when applying patches that touch live state? Already partially done (state-verification.md exists, 174L) — check if duplicated content can be consolidated. (2) PROP-016 NEVER_PUSH_PRE_COMMIT_DETECT block (~50L) is mostly bash — extract to monitor/scripts/check-never-push.sh and have decider call it instead of inlining the algorithm in prompt.

findings.evidence: ls -d monitor/analyst/external-reports → no such file or directory; tinker.md L16 still lists it.
findings.recommended_action: Either create the directory if it's a planned output or remove the mention. Defer to operator — the convention may have evolved.

The summary file appears to no longer be the canonical handoff — analyst now writes per-run reports elsewhere, per the changed analyst dispatcher.

findings.recommended_action: Either decommission the file (delete reference from any consumer prompts) or fix analyst to update it. Defer to operator — low impact, file may be vestigial.

findings.description: Step 1b re-work scan: 3 curmudgeon duplicate-target reviews (WIN-067 c1/c2/c3, SEC-4.1 c1/c2, timestamp-error-tab-apr2026-update c1/c2) — these are intentional cycle-N follow-ups, not unwanted re-reviews. 17 expansion files with mtime > integrated_at on FUSE — ALL pre-2026-04-15, pattern fully resolved post-bulk-onboarding (most-recent re-work was 2026-04-14). 0 orphan proposals (251/251 in ledger). 0 duplicate new-wins. 0 stale priority-queue items. Pipeline waste is at all-time low.

recommendations.description: Apply stranded self-fix STRANDED-TINKER-SCHEDULE-FIX-2026-05-07: 2 find/replace patches to CLAUDE.md and monitor/prompts/tinker.md correcting stale schedule-table rows for integrity / tinker / social.

Apply stranded patch (STRANDED-EXP-290-generate-html, 1h old) — three find/replace patches to build-scripts/generate-html.js for the Timestamp Error tab. Operator follows the 'operator_action' steps in the stranded-patch file: cd to clone, apply patches, build, test, commit, push, move file to applied-stranded-patches/.

Review and approve PROP-023 (file-ownership classification gaps) — adds operator-directives/, scripts/, applied-patches/, applied-stranded-patches/ to CLAUDE.md File Ownership table; adds state-verification.md and state-file-archives.md to per-agent reference lists in CLAUDE.md.

Fix PROP-020 and PROP-021 verification patterns. Both currently self-referential (test that the PROP file exists with a verification_pattern field), which is exactly the PROP-003 cautionary-tale failure mode. Need real targets that test whether the underlying optimization was implemented.

Decider context load grew +14.1% over 6 days (over 10% threshold). All growth justified, but a future Mode 3 should explore extraction candidates: (a) consolidating PROP-014 mechanism docs that overlap between decider-patches-and-selfapply.md and state-verification.md; (b) extracting PROP-016 NEVER_PUSH_PRE_COMMIT_DETECT bash block (~50L) to monitor/scripts/check-never-push.sh.
